posts.caption:
Trivia is BACK! With a special guest host… me!

I’ll be filling in for @nick_wilson2112 THIS THURSDAY at @curitiba_art_cafe 

Come join us for a fun and free to play trivia with an assortment of categories including an extra special Madonna category in honor of her new #confessionspart2 album release on Friday 

See you at 919 Caroline St this Thursday at 7!

#trivia #triviathursday #fxbg #explore

BROOKHOUSE IS BACK THIS THURSDAY, 8pm to 10pm.

This Group is one of our absolute favorites from Richmond, Virginia! Alex and his team of young talent musicians have such great energy. Alex's songwriting is positive in its messaging while still telling serious stories about growing up with the cultural tension that comes with being a part of an immigrant family in America. It can be difficult to balance being a part of a new community while cherishing the identity of who you are and where you came from.  American Sounds is the song that is featured in this post. It does a beautiful job of laying out that tension in such an honest and truthful way! And reminds us all that immigrant culture is American culture! Especially in art. BrookHouse's American Sound can be found on your favorite streaming site!

Come out this Thursday to see @brookhouse.music to hear more of Alex's insightful songwriting and introspection. We'll be serving Coffee, food, and Craft Cocktails, and best of all,l the show is free.

Come out and support independent Music as well as small businesses!

At Curitiba Art lives here!

#fxbgart #originalmusic #fxbgevents #smallbusiness #

There's nothing better than artists joining forces across disciplines. 
This Thursday in Fredericksburg at @curitiba_art_cafe we're doing another music and poetry night! Tony Trimm is our featured poet, and @_myrish joins @brookhouse.music for the musical portion of the evening!

#fredericksburg #virginia #fredericksburgva #livemusic
